Metadata.SourceFile: Saga of Erik the Viking, The.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC430 "THESAGAOFERIKTHEVIKING-9E00-C430" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $9e00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Saga of Erik the Viking, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
As this game uses two small BASIC programs to display info before the games starts, these have been slightly modified and merged into one program and written back to $0801. The follow changes were also made:
1. A routine was added at $9E00 which sets the correct VICII and BASIC pointer values before executing the BASIC RUN command, which runs the modified intro program, which jumps to the start address at $9F00 when finished. 2. This routine also disables the RUN/STOP key by modifying the STOP vector by setting $E1 at $0328. 3. A routine was added at $9F00 which sets the current cursor row ($D6) to the last line of the screen editor, before jumping to the start address of the game itself at $C430.
